---
title: "About"
---

# About Me

Hi! My name is Jesslyn Evangelista, and I am currently a Statistics and Data Science student at UCLA, with a minor in Data Science Engineering. At UCLA, I have gained experience in areas such as machine learning, statistical modeling, and data visualization. I enjoy exploring how different methods can be used to extract insights from complex datasets and communicate those findings clearly. Through my coursework and projects, I have worked with programming languages such as Python, R, SQL, and C++, and have experience using tools such as Snowflake, Power BI, Tableau, and GitHub. Outside of academics, I am always interested in learning new technologies and expanding my knowledge in data science and machine learning.

# Skills

**Programming:**  
R · Python · SQL · C++  

**Data Tools:**  
Snowflake · Power BI · Tableau  

**Areas of Interest:**  
Machine Learning · Data Science · Statistical Modeling · Data Visualization
